tEn: Breaking the Softmax Bottleneck: A High-Rank RNN Language Model
tZh: 打破Softmax瓶颈：一种高秩RNN语言模型
sEn: We propose a high-rank RNN language model that overcomes the Softmax bottleneck, achieving state-of-the-art perplexities on multiple benchmarks.
sZh: 我们提出了一种高秩RNN语言模型，克服了Softmax瓶颈，在多个基准上取得了最先进的困惑度。
absEn: We formulate language modeling as a matrix factorization problem, and show that the expressiveness of Softmax-based models (including the majority of neural language models) is limited by a Softmax bottleneck. Given that natural language is highly context-dependent, this further implies that in practice Softmax with distributed word embeddings does not have enough capacity to model natural language. We propose a simple and effective method to address this issue, and improve the state-of-the-art perplexities on Penn Treebank and WikiText-2 to 47.69 and 40.68 respectively. The proposed method also excels on the large-scale 1B Word dataset, outperforming the baseline by over 5.6 points in perplexity.
absZh: 我们将语言建模表述为一个矩阵分解问题，并表明基于Softmax的模型（包括大多数神经语言模型）的表达能力受到Softmax瓶颈的限制。鉴于自然语言高度依赖上下文，这进一步意味着在实践中，带有分布式词嵌入的Softmax没有足够的容量来建模自然语言。我们提出了一种简单有效的方法来解决这个问题，并在Penn Treebank和WikiText-2上将最先进的困惑度分别提高到47.69和40.68。所提出的方法在大规模1B单词数据集上也表现出色，困惑度比基线提高了超过5.6个点。

contrib.en: Identifies the Softmax bottleneck by formulating language modeling as a matrix factorization problem.
contrib.zh: 通过将语言建模形式化为矩阵分解问题，识别出Softmax瓶颈。

contrib.en: Proposes Mixture of Softmaxes (MoS) to break the rank limitation of Softmax-based models.
contrib.zh: 提出混合Softmax（MoS）以打破基于Softmax模型的秩限制。

contrib.en: Achieves state-of-the-art perplexities on Penn Treebank (47.69) and WikiText-2 (40.68).
contrib.zh: 在Penn Treebank（47.69）和WikiText-2（40.68）上达到最先进的困惑度。

contrib.en: Outperforms baseline by over 5.6 perplexity points on the large-scale 1B Word dataset.
contrib.zh: 在大规模1B Word数据集上，困惑度比基线低5.6以上。

contrib.en: Demonstrates that MoS learns high-rank log-probability matrices, unlike Softmax and MoC.
contrib.zh: 证明MoS学习高秩对数概率矩阵，而Softmax和MoC则不然。

contrib.en: Shows positive correlation between matrix rank and language modeling performance.
contrib.zh: 展示矩阵秩与语言建模性能之间的正相关关系。

limits.en: MoS introduces computational overhead due to K-times larger Softmax computation.
limits.zh: MoS因K倍更大的Softmax计算而引入计算开销。

limits.en: The theoretical analysis assumes a finite set of contexts, though natural language is unbounded.
limits.zh: 理论分析假设上下文有限，而自然语言是无界的。

limits.en: MoS may overfit when the number of mixture components is too large, as shown in experiments.
limits.zh: 实验表明，混合成分过多时MoS可能过拟合。

limits.en: The method is evaluated only on language modeling and dialog tasks; generalizability to other domains is not proven.
limits.zh: 该方法仅在语言建模和对话任务上评估，未证明对其他领域的泛化性。

limits.en: The rank estimation relies on numerical approximations and may not be exact.
limits.zh: 秩估计依赖于数值近似，可能不精确。

items.en: We formulate language modeling as a matrix factorization problem, and show that the expressiveness of Softmax-based models (including the majority of neural language models) is limited by a Softmax bottleneck. Given that natural language is highly context-dependent, this further implies that in practice Softmax with distributed word embeddings does not have enough capacity to model natural language. We propose a simple and effective method to address this issue, and improve the state-of-the-art perplexities on Penn Treebank and WikiText-2 to 47.69 and 40.68 respectively. The proposed method also excels on the large-scale 1B Word dataset, outperforming the baseline by over 5.6 points in perplexity.111Code is available at https://github.com/zihangdai/mos.
items.zh: 我们将语言建模表述为一个矩阵分解问题，并证明基于Softmax的模型（包括大多数神经语言模型）的表达能力受到Softmax瓶颈的限制。鉴于自然语言高度依赖上下文，这进一步意味着在实践中，使用分布式词嵌入的Softmax没有足够的能力来建模自然语言。我们提出了一种简单有效的方法来解决这个问题，并在Penn Treebank和WikiText-2上将最先进的困惑度分别提高到47.69和40.68。所提出的方法在大规模1B Word数据集上也表现出色，困惑度比基线提高了超过5.6个点。代码可在https://github.com/zihangdai/mos获取。

items.en: As a fundamental task in natural language processing, statistical language modeling has gone through significant development from traditional Ngram language models to neural language models in the last decade (Bengio et al., 2003; Mnih & Hinton, 2007; Mikolov et al., 2010). Despite the huge variety of models, as a density estimation problem, language modeling mostly relies on a universal auto-regressive factorization of the joint probability and then models each conditional factor using different approaches. Specifically, given a corpus of tokens 𝐗=(X1,…,XT)𝐗subscript𝑋1…subscript𝑋𝑇\mathbf{X}=(X_{1},\dots,X_{T}), the joint probability P​(𝐗)𝑃𝐗P(\mathbf{X}) factorizes as P​(𝐗)=∏tP​(Xt∣X<t)=∏tP​(Xt∣Ct),𝑃𝐗subscriptproduct𝑡𝑃conditionalsubscript𝑋𝑡subscript𝑋absent𝑡subscriptproduct𝑡𝑃conditionalsubscript𝑋𝑡subscript𝐶𝑡P(\mathbf{X})=\prod_{t}P(X_{t}\mid X_{<t})=\prod_{t}P(X_{t}\mid C_{t}), where Ct=X<tsubscript𝐶𝑡subscript𝑋absent𝑡C_{t}=X_{<t} is referred to as the context of the conditional probability hereafter.
items.zh: 作为自然语言处理中的一项基本任务，统计语言建模在过去十年中经历了从传统Ngram语言模型到神经语言模型的重大发展（Bengio等人，2003；Mnih & Hinton，2007；Mikolov等人，2010）。尽管模型种类繁多，但作为密度估计问题，语言建模主要依赖于联合概率的通用自回归分解，然后使用不同的方法对每个条件因子进行建模。具体来说，给定一个词元语料库𝐗=(X1,…,XT)，联合概率P(𝐗)分解为P(𝐗)=∏tP(Xt∣X<t)=∏tP(Xt∣Ct)，其中Ct=X<t以下称为条件概率的上下文。

items.en: Based on the factorization, recurrent neural networks (RNN) based language models achieve state-of-the-art results on various benchmarks (Merity et al., 2017; Melis et al., 2017; Krause et al., 2017). A standard approach is to use a recurrent network to encode the context into a fixed size vector, which is then multiplied by the word embeddings (Inan et al., 2016; Press & Wolf, 2017) using dot product to obtain the logits. The logits are consumed by the Softmax function to give a categorical probability distribution over the next token. In spite of the expressiveness of RNNs as universal approximators (Schäfer & Zimmermann, 2006), an unclear question is whether the combination of dot product and Softmax is capable of modeling the conditional probability, which can vary dramatically with the change of the context.
items.zh: 基于这种分解，基于循环神经网络（RNN）的语言模型在各种基准测试中取得了最先进的结果（Merity等人，2017；Melis等人，2017；Krause等人，2017）。一种标准方法是使用循环网络将上下文编码为固定大小的向量，然后通过点积与词嵌入（Inan等人，2016；Press & Wolf，2017）相乘得到logits。这些logits由Softmax函数处理，以给出下一个词元上的分类概率分布。尽管RNN作为通用逼近器具有表达能力（Schäfer & Zimmermann，2006），但尚不清楚点积和Softmax的组合是否能够建模随上下文变化而剧烈变化的条件概率。

items.en: In this work, we study the expressiveness of the aforementioned Softmax-based recurrent language models from a perspective of matrix factorization. We show that learning a Softmax-based recurrent language model with the standard formulation is essentially equivalent to solving a matrix factorization problem. More importantly, due to the fact that natural language is highly context-dependent, the matrix to be factorized can be high-rank. This further implies that standard Softmax-based language models with distributed (output) word embeddings do not have enough capacity to model natural language. We call this the Softmax bottleneck.
items.zh: 在这项工作中，我们从矩阵分解的角度研究了上述基于Softmax的循环语言模型的表达能力。我们表明，使用标准公式学习基于Softmax的循环语言模型本质上等同于解决一个矩阵分解问题。更重要的是，由于自然语言高度依赖上下文，待分解的矩阵可能是高秩的。这进一步意味着，使用分布式（输出）词嵌入的标准基于Softmax的语言模型没有足够的能力来建模自然语言。我们称此为Softmax瓶颈。

items.en: We propose a simple and effective method to address the Softmax bottleneck. Specifically, we introduce discrete latent variables into a recurrent language model, and formulate the next-token probability distribution as a Mixture of Softmaxes (MoS). Mixture of Softmaxes is more expressive than Softmax and other surrogates considered in prior work. Moreover, we show that MoS learns matrices that have much larger normalized singular values and thus much higher rank than Softmax and other baselines on real-world datasets.
items.zh: 我们提出了一种简单有效的方法来解决Softmax瓶颈。具体来说，我们将离散潜在变量引入循环语言模型，并将下一个词元概率分布表述为Softmax混合（MoS）。Softmax混合比Softmax和先前工作中考虑的其他替代方法更具表达能力。此外，我们表明MoS在真实世界数据集上学习到的矩阵具有更大的归一化奇异值，因此秩远高于Softmax和其他基线。

items.en: We evaluate our proposed approach on standard language modeling benchmarks. MoS substantially improves over the current state-of-the-art results on benchmarks, by up to 3.6 points in terms of perplexity, reaching perplexities 47.69 on Penn Treebank and 40.68 on WikiText-2. We further apply MoS to a dialog dataset and show improved performance over Softmax and other baselines.
items.zh: 我们在标准语言建模基准上评估了我们提出的方法。MoS在基准测试上显著优于当前最先进的结果，困惑度最多提高3.6个点，在Penn Treebank上达到47.69，在WikiText-2上达到40.68。我们进一步将MoS应用于对话数据集，并显示出比Softmax和其他基线更好的性能。

items.en: Our contribution is two-fold. First, we identify the Softmax bottleneck by formulating language modeling as a matrix factorization problem. Second, we propose a simple and effective method that substantially improves over the current state-of-the-art results.
items.zh: 我们的贡献有两个方面。首先，我们通过将语言建模表述为矩阵分解问题，识别出Softmax瓶颈。其次，我们提出了一种简单有效的方法，显著改进了当前最先进的结果。

items.en: As discussed in Section 1, with the autoregressive factorization, language modeling can be reduced to modeling the conditional distribution of the next token x𝑥x given the context c𝑐c. Though one might argue that a natural language allows an infinite number of contexts due to its compositionality (Pinker, 1994), we proceed with our analysis by considering a finite set of possible contexts. The unboundedness of natural language does not affect our conclusions, which will be discussed later.

items.en: This is essentially a matrix factorization problem. We want the model to learn matrices 𝐇θsubscript𝐇𝜃\mathbf{H}_{\theta} and 𝐖θsubscript𝐖𝜃\mathbf{W}_{\theta} that are able to factorize some matrix 𝐀′∈F​(𝐀)superscript𝐀′𝐹𝐀\mathbf{A}^{\prime}\in F(\mathbf{A}). First, note that for a valid factorization to exist, the rank of 𝐇θ​𝐖θ⊤subscript𝐇𝜃superscriptsubscript𝐖𝜃top\mathbf{H}_{\theta}\mathbf{W}_{\theta}^{\top} has to be at least as large as the rank of 𝐀′superscript𝐀′\mathbf{A}^{\prime}. Further, since 𝐇θ∈ℝN×dsubscript𝐇𝜃superscriptℝ𝑁𝑑\mathbf{H}_{\theta}\in\mathbb{R}^{N\times d} and 𝐖θ∈ℝM×dsubscript𝐖𝜃superscriptℝ𝑀𝑑\mathbf{W}_{\theta}\in\mathbb{R}^{M\times d}, the rank of 𝐇θ​𝐖θ⊤subscript𝐇𝜃superscriptsubscript𝐖𝜃top\mathbf{H}_{\theta}\mathbf{W}_{\theta}^{\top} is strictly upper bounded by the embedding size d𝑑d. As a result, if d≥rank​(𝐀′)𝑑ranksuperscript𝐀′d\geq\text{rank}(\mathbf{A}^{\prime}), a universal approximator can theoretically recover 𝐀′superscript𝐀′\mathbf{A}^{\prime}. However, if d<rank​(𝐀′)𝑑ranksuperscript𝐀′d<\text{rank}(\mathbf{A}^{\prime}), no matter how expressive the function family 𝒰𝒰\mathcal{U} is, no (𝐇θ,𝐖θ)subscript𝐇𝜃subscript𝐖𝜃(\mathbf{H}_{\theta},\mathbf{W}_{\theta}) can even theoretically recover 𝐀′superscript𝐀′\mathbf{A}^{\prime}. We summarize the reasoning above as follows (see Appendix A for the proof).
items.zh: 这本质上是一个矩阵分解问题。我们希望模型学习能够分解某个矩阵 A' ∈ F(A) 的矩阵 Hθ 和 Wθ。首先，注意要存在有效的分解，HθWθ^⊤ 的秩必须至少与 A' 的秩一样大。此外，由于 Hθ ∈ ℝ^{N×d} 且 Wθ ∈ ℝ^{M×d}，HθWθ^⊤ 的秩严格受限于嵌入大小 d。因此，如果 d ≥ rank(A')，通用逼近器理论上可以恢复 A'。然而，如果 d < rank(A')，无论函数族 𝒰 多么具有表达能力，没有任何 (Hθ, Wθ) 能在理论上恢复 A'。我们将上述推理总结如下（证明见附录 A）。

items.en: Given that the function family 𝒰𝒰\mathcal{U} is a universal approximator, there exists a parameter θ𝜃\theta such that Pθ​(X|c)=P∗​(X|c)subscript𝑃𝜃conditional𝑋𝑐superscript𝑃conditional𝑋𝑐P_{\theta}(X|c)=P^{*}(X|c) for all c𝑐c in ℒℒ\mathcal{L} if and only if d≥min𝐀′∈F​(𝐀)⁡rank​(𝐀′)𝑑subscriptsuperscript𝐀′𝐹𝐀ranksuperscript𝐀′d\geq\min_{\mathbf{A}^{\prime}\in F(\mathbf{A})}\text{rank}(\mathbf{A}^{\prime}).
items.zh: 给定函数族 𝒰 是通用逼近器，当且仅当 d ≥ min_{A'∈F(A)} rank(A') 时，存在参数 θ 使得对于 ℒ 中的所有 c，有 Pθ(X|c)=P*(X|c)。

items.en: Combining Proposition 1 with the Property 2 of F​(𝐀)𝐹𝐀F(\mathbf{A}), we are now able to state the Softmax Bottleneck problem formally.
items.zh: 结合命题 1 与 F(A) 的性质 2，我们现在能够正式陈述 Softmax 瓶颈问题。

items.en: (Softmax Bottleneck) If d<rank​(𝐀)−1drank𝐀1d<\text{rank}(\mathbf{A})-1, for any function family 𝒰𝒰\mathcal{U} and any model parameter θθ\theta, there exists a context ccc in ℒℒ\mathcal{L} such that Pθ​(X|c)≠P∗​(X|c)subscriptPθconditionalXcsuperscriptPconditionalXcP_{\theta}(X|c)\not=P^{*}(X|c).
items.zh: （Softmax 瓶颈）如果 d < rank(A)-1，则对于任何函数族 𝒰 和任何模型参数 θ，存在 ℒ 中的上下文 c，使得 Pθ(X|c) ≠ P*(X|c)。

items.en: The above corollary indicates that when the dimension d𝑑d is too small, Softmax does not have the capacity to express the true data distribution. Clearly, this conclusion is not restricted to a finite language ℒℒ\mathcal{L}. When ℒℒ\mathcal{L} is infinite, one can always take a finite subset and the Softmax bottleneck still exists. Next, we discuss why the Softmax bottleneck is an issue by presenting our hypothesis that 𝐀𝐀\mathbf{A} is high-rank for natural language.
items.zh: 上述推论表明，当维度 d 太小时，Softmax 没有能力表达真实数据分布。显然，这一结论不限于有限语言 ℒ。当 ℒ 无限时，总可以取一个有限子集，Softmax 瓶颈仍然存在。接下来，我们通过提出我们的假设——对于自然语言，A 是高秩的——来讨论为什么 Softmax 瓶颈是一个问题。

full.secZh: 2.2 假设：自然语言是高秩的

items.en: We hypothesize that for a natural language ℒℒ\mathcal{L}, the log probability matrix 𝐀𝐀\mathbf{A} is a high-rank matrix. It is difficult (if possible) to rigorously prove this hypothesis since we do not have access to the true data distribution of a natural language. However, it is suggested by the following intuitive reasoning and empirical observations:
items.zh: 我们假设对于自然语言 ℒ，对数概率矩阵 A 是一个高秩矩阵。严格证明这一假设是困难的（如果可能的话），因为我们无法访问自然语言的真实数据分布。然而，以下直观推理和经验观察表明了这一点：

items.en: Natural language is highly context-dependent (Mikolov & Zweig, 2012). For example, the token “north” is likely to be followed by “korea” or “korean” in a news article on international politics, which however is unlikely in a textbook on U.S. domestic history. We hypothesize that such subtle context dependency should result in a high-rank matrix 𝐀𝐀\mathbf{A}.
items.zh: 自然语言高度依赖上下文（Mikolov & Zweig, 2012）。例如，在国际政治新闻文章中，词元“north”后面很可能跟“korea”或“korean”，但在美国国内历史教科书中则不太可能。我们假设这种微妙的上下文依赖性应导致高秩矩阵 A。

items.en: If 𝐀𝐀\mathbf{A} is low-rank, it means humans only need a limited number (e.g. a few hundred) of bases, and all semantic meanings can be created by (potentially) negating and (weighted) averaging these bases. However, it is hard to find a natural concept in linguistics and cognitive science that corresponds to such bases, which questions the existence of such bases. For example, semantic meanings might not be those bases since a few hundred meanings may not be enough to cover everyday meanings, not to mention niche meanings in specialized domains.
items.zh: 如果 A 是低秩的，意味着人类只需要有限数量（例如几百个）的基，所有语义可以通过（可能）取反和（加权）平均这些基来创建。然而，很难在语言学和认知科学中找到与这些基对应的自然概念，这质疑了此类基的存在。例如，语义可能不是这些基，因为几百个含义可能不足以覆盖日常含义，更不用说专业领域中的小众含义。

items.en: Empirically, our high-rank language model outperforms conventional low-rank language models on several benchmarks, as shown in Section 3. We also provide evidences in Section 3.3 to support our hypothesis that learning a high-rank language model is important.
items.zh: 经验上，我们的高秩语言模型在多个基准测试上优于传统的低秩语言模型，如第 3 节所示。我们还在第 3.3 节提供了证据来支持我们的假设，即学习高秩语言模型很重要。

items.en: Given the hypothesis that natural language is high-rank, it is clear that the Softmax bottleneck limits the expressiveness of the models. In practice, the embedding dimension d𝑑d is usually set at the scale of 102superscript10210^{2}, while the rank of 𝐀𝐀\mathbf{A} can possibly be as high as M𝑀M (at the scale of 105superscript10510^{5}), which is orders of magnitude larger than d𝑑d. Softmax is effectively learning a low-rank approximation to 𝐀𝐀\mathbf{A}, and our experiments suggest that such approximation loses the ability to model context dependency, both qualitatively and quantitatively (Cf. Section 3).
items.zh: 鉴于自然语言是高秩的假设，很明显 Softmax 瓶颈限制了模型的表达能力。在实践中，嵌入维度 d 通常设置为 10^2 量级，而 A 的秩可能高达 M（10^5 量级），比 d 大几个数量级。Softmax 实际上是在学习 A 的低秩近似，我们的实验表明，这种近似在定性和定量上都失去了建模上下文依赖性的能力（参见第 3 节）。

items.en: Identifying the Softmax bottleneck immediately suggests some possible “easy fixes”. First, as considered by a lot of prior work, one can employ a non-parametric model, namely an Ngram model (Kneser & Ney, 1995). Ngram models are not constrained by any parametric forms so it can universally approximate any natural language, given enough parameters. Second, it is possible to increase the dimension d𝑑d (e.g., to match M𝑀M) so that the model can express a high-rank matrix 𝐀𝐀\mathbf{A}.
items.zh: 识别出 Softmax 瓶颈立即提示了一些可能的“简单修复”。首先，正如许多先前工作所考虑的，可以采用非参数模型，即 Ngram 模型（Kneser & Ney, 1995）。Ngram 模型不受任何参数形式的约束，因此在给定足够参数的情况下可以通用逼近任何自然语言。其次，可以增加维度 d（例如，匹配 M），使得模型能够表达高秩矩阵 A。

items.en: However, these two methods increase the number of parameters dramatically, compared to using a low-dimensional Softmax. More specifically, an Ngram needs (N×M)𝑁𝑀(N\times M) parameters in order to express 𝐀𝐀\mathbf{A}, where N𝑁N is potentially unbounded. Similarly, a high-dimensional Softmax requires (M×M)𝑀𝑀(M\times M) parameters for the word embeddings. Increasing the number of model parameters easily leads to overfitting. In past work, Kneser & Ney (1995) used back-off to alleviate overfitting. Moreover, as deep learning models were tuned by extensive hyper-parameter search, increasing the dimension d𝑑d beyond several hundred is not helpful333This is also confirmed by our preliminary experiments. (Merity et al., 2017; Melis et al., 2017; Krause et al., 2017).
items.zh: 然而，与使用低维 Softmax 相比，这两种方法会急剧增加参数数量。更具体地说，Ngram 需要 (N×M) 个参数来表达 A，其中 N 可能是无界的。类似地，高维 Softmax 需要 (M×M) 个参数用于词嵌入。增加模型参数数量容易导致过拟合。在以往工作中，Kneser & Ney (1995) 使用回退来缓解过拟合。此外，由于深度学习模型通过大量超参数搜索进行调整，将维度 d 增加到几百以上并无帮助（这也被我们的初步实验证实）（Merity et al., 2017; Melis et al., 2017; Krause et al., 2017）。

items.en: Clearly there is a tradeoff between expressiveness and generalization on language modeling. Naively increasing the expressiveness hurts generalization. Below, we introduce an alternative approach that increases the expressiveness without exploding the parametric space.
items.zh: 显然，在语言建模的表达能力和泛化之间存在权衡。简单地增加表达能力会损害泛化。下面，我们介绍一种替代方法，在不爆炸参数空间的情况下增加表达能力。

full.sec: 2.4 Mixture of Softmaxes: A High-Rank Language Model
full.secZh: 2.4 Softmax混合：一种高秩语言模型

items.en: We propose a high-rank language model called Mixture of Softmaxes (MoS) to alleviate the Softmax bottleneck issue. MoS formulates the conditional distribution as
items.zh: 我们提出了一种称为混合 Softmax（MoS）的高秩语言模型来缓解 Softmax 瓶颈问题。MoS 将条件分布表述为

items.en: where πc,ksubscript𝜋𝑐𝑘\pi_{c,k} is the prior or mixture weight of the k𝑘k-th component, and 𝐡c,ksubscript𝐡𝑐𝑘\mathbf{h}_{c,k} is the k𝑘k-th context vector associated with context c𝑐c. In other words, MoS computes K𝐾K Softmax distributions and uses a weighted average of them as the next-token probability distribution. Similar to prior work on recurrent language modeling (Merity et al., 2017; Melis et al., 2017; Krause et al., 2017), we first apply a stack of recurrent layers on top of 𝐗𝐗\mathbf{X} to obtain a sequence of hidden states (𝐠1,⋯,𝐠T)subscript𝐠1⋯subscript𝐠𝑇(\mathbf{g}_{1},\cdots,\mathbf{g}_{T}). The prior and the context vector for context ctsubscript𝑐𝑡c_{t} are parameterized as πct,k=exp⁡𝐰π,k⊤​𝐠t∑k′=1Kexp⁡𝐰π,k′⊤​𝐠tsubscript𝜋subscript𝑐𝑡𝑘superscriptsubscript𝐰𝜋𝑘topsubscript𝐠𝑡superscriptsubscriptsuperscript𝑘′1𝐾superscriptsubscript𝐰𝜋superscript𝑘′topsubscript𝐠𝑡\pi_{c_{t},k}=\frac{\exp\mathbf{w}_{\pi,k}^{\top}\mathbf{g}_{t}}{\sum_{k^{\prime}=1}^{K}\exp\mathbf{w}_{\pi,k^{\prime}}^{\top}\mathbf{g}_{t}} and 𝐡ct,k=tanh​(𝐖h,k​𝐠t)subscript𝐡subscript𝑐𝑡𝑘tanhsubscript𝐖ℎ𝑘subscript𝐠𝑡\mathbf{h}_{c_{t},k}=\text{tanh}(\mathbf{W}_{h,k}\mathbf{g}_{t}) where 𝐰π,ksubscript𝐰𝜋𝑘\mathbf{w}_{\pi,k} and 𝐖h,ksubscript𝐖ℎ𝑘\mathbf{W}_{h,k} are model parameters.
items.zh: 其中 π_{c,k} 是第 k 个分量的先验或混合权重，h_{c,k} 是与上下文 c 关联的第 k 个上下文向量。换句话说，MoS 计算 K 个 Softmax 分布，并使用它们的加权平均作为下一个词元的概率分布。与先前关于循环语言模型的工作类似（Merity et al., 2017; Melis et al., 2017; Krause et al., 2017），我们首先在 X 上应用一系列循环层以获得隐藏状态序列 (g_1, ..., g_T)。上下文 c_t 的先验和上下文向量参数化为 π_{c_t,k} = exp(w_{π,k}^⊤ g_t) / Σ_{k'=1}^K exp(w_{π,k'}^⊤ g_t) 和 h_{c_t,k} = tanh(W_{h,k} g_t)，其中 w_{π,k} 和 W_{h,k} 是模型参数。

items.en: Our method is simple and easy to implement, and has the following advantages:
items.zh: 我们的方法简单且易于实现，并具有以下优点：

items.en: Improved expressiveness (compared to Softmax). MoS is theoretically more (or at least equally) expressive compared to Softmax given the same dimension d𝑑d. This can be seen by the fact that MoS with K=1𝐾1K=1 is reduced to Softmax. More importantly, MoS effectively approximates 𝐀𝐀\mathbf{A} by
items.zh: 改进的表达能力（与 Softmax 相比）。在相同维度 d 下，MoS 在理论上比 Softmax 更具（或至少同等）表达能力。这可以从 MoS 在 K=1 时退化为 Softmax 这一事实看出。更重要的是，MoS 通过下式有效逼近 A：

items.en: where 𝚷ksubscript𝚷𝑘\mathbf{\Pi}_{k} is an (N×N)𝑁𝑁(N\times N) diagonal matrix with elements being the prior πc,ksubscript𝜋𝑐𝑘\pi_{c,k}. Because 𝐀^MoSsubscript^𝐀MoS\hat{\mathbf{A}}_{\text{MoS}} is a nonlinear function (log_sum_exp) of the context vectors and the word embeddings, 𝐀^MoSsubscript^𝐀MoS\hat{\mathbf{A}}_{\text{MoS}} can be arbitrarily high-rank. As a result, MoS does not suffer from the rank limitation, compared to Softmax.
items.zh: 其中 Π_k 是一个 (N×N) 对角矩阵，元素为先验 π_{c,k}。由于 Â_MoS 是上下文向量和词嵌入的非线性函数（log_sum_exp），Â_MoS 可以是任意高秩的。因此，与 Softmax 相比，MoS 不受秩限制的影响。

items.en: Improved generalization (compared to Ngram). Ngram models and high-dimensional Softmax (Cf. Section 2.3) improve the expressiveness but do not generalize well. In contrast, MoS does not have a generalization issue due to the following reasons. First, MoS defines the following generative process: a discrete latent variable k𝑘k is first sampled from {1,⋯,K}1⋯𝐾\{1,\cdots,K\}, and then the next token is sampled based on the k𝑘k-th Softmax component. By doing so we introduce an inductive bias that the next token is generated based on a latent discrete decision (e.g., a topic), which is often safe in language modeling (Blei et al., 2003). Second, since 𝐀^MoSsubscript^𝐀MoS\hat{\mathbf{A}}_{\text{MoS}} is defined by a nonlinear function and not restricted by the rank bottleneck, in practice it is possible to reduce d𝑑d to compensate for the increase of model parameters brought by the mixture structure. As a result, MoS has a similar model size compared to Softmax and thus is not prone to overfitting.
items.zh: 改进的泛化能力（与Ngram相比）。Ngram模型和高维Softmax（参见第2.3节）提高了表达能力，但泛化能力不佳。相比之下，MoS没有泛化问题，原因如下。首先，MoS定义了以下生成过程：首先从{1,…,K}中采样离散潜变量k，然后基于第k个Softmax分量采样下一个词。通过这样做，我们引入了一个归纳偏置，即下一个词是基于潜在的离散决策（例如主题）生成的，这在语言建模中通常是安全的（Blei等人，2003）。其次，由于Â_MoS由非线性函数定义且不受秩瓶颈限制，实际上可以降低d以补偿混合结构带来的模型参数增加。因此，MoS与Softmax相比具有相似的模型大小，因此不易过拟合。

full.sec: 2.5 Mixture of Contexts: A Low-Rank Baseline
full.secZh: 2.5 上下文混合：一种低秩基线

items.en: where 𝐡c,ksubscript𝐡𝑐𝑘\mathbf{h}_{c,k} and πc,ksubscript𝜋𝑐𝑘\pi_{c,k} share the same parameterization as in MoS. Despite its superficial similarity to MoS, this model, which we refer to as mixture of contexts (MoC), actually suffers from the same rank limitation problem as Softmax. This can be easily seen by defining 𝐡′c=∑k=1Kπc,k​𝐡c,ksubscriptsuperscript𝐡′𝑐superscriptsubscript𝑘1𝐾subscript𝜋𝑐𝑘subscript𝐡𝑐𝑘\mathbf{h^{\prime}}_{c}=\sum_{k=1}^{K}\pi_{c,k}\mathbf{h}_{c,k}, which turns the MoC parameterization (2) into Pθ​(x|c)=exp⁡𝐡′c⊤​𝐰x∑x′exp⁡𝐡′c⊤​𝐰x′subscript𝑃𝜃conditional𝑥𝑐subscriptsuperscriptsuperscript𝐡′top𝑐subscript𝐰𝑥subscriptsuperscript𝑥′subscriptsuperscriptsuperscript𝐡′top𝑐subscript𝐰superscript𝑥′P_{\theta}(x|c)=\frac{\exp\mathbf{h^{\prime}}^{\top}_{c}\mathbf{w}_{x}}{\sum_{x^{\prime}}\exp\mathbf{h^{\prime}}^{\top}_{c}\mathbf{w}_{x^{\prime}}}. Note that this is equivalent to the Softmax parameterization (1). Thus, performing mixture in the feature space can only make the function family 𝒰𝒰\mathcal{U} more expressive, but does not change the fact that the rank of 𝐇θ​𝐖θ⊤subscript𝐇𝜃superscriptsubscript𝐖𝜃top\mathbf{H}_{\theta}\mathbf{W}_{\theta}^{\top} is upper bounded by the embedding dimension d𝑑d. In our experiments, we implement MoC as a baseline and compare it experimentally to MoS.

items.en: We conduct a series of experiments with the following settings:
items.zh: 我们进行了一系列实验，设置如下：

items.en: Following previous work (Krause et al., 2017; Merity et al., 2017; Melis et al., 2017), we evaluate the proposed MoS model on two widely used language modeling datasets, namely Penn Treebank (PTB) (Mikolov et al., 2010) and WikiText-2 (WT2) (Merity et al., 2016) based on perplexity. For fair comparison, we closely follow the regularization and optimization techniques introduced by Merity et al. (2017). We heuristically and manually search hyper-parameters for MoS based on the validation performance while limiting the model size (see Appendix B.1 for our hyper-parameters).
items.zh: 遵循先前的工作（Krause等人，2017；Merity等人，2017；Melis等人，2017），我们在两个广泛使用的语言建模数据集上评估提出的MoS模型，即Penn Treebank（PTB）（Mikolov等人，2010）和WikiText-2（WT2）（Merity等人，2016），基于困惑度。为了公平比较，我们严格遵循Merity等人（2017）引入的正则化和优化技术。我们基于验证性能启发式地手动搜索MoS的超参数，同时限制模型大小（超参数见附录B.1）。

items.en: To investigate whether the effectiveness of MoS can be extended to even larger datasets, we conduct an additional language modeling experiment on the 1B Word dataset (Chelba et al., 2013). Specifically, we lower-case the text and choose the top 100K tokens as the vocabulary. A standard neural language model with 2 layers of LSTMs followed by a Softmax output layer is used as the baseline. Again, the network size of MoS is adjusted to ensure a comparable number of parameters. Notably, dropout was not used, since we found it not helpful to either model (see Appendix B.2 for more details).
items.zh: 为了研究MoS的有效性是否可以扩展到更大的数据集，我们在1B Word数据集（Chelba等人，2013）上进行了额外的语言建模实验。具体来说，我们将文本小写化并选择前10万个词作为词汇表。使用一个标准的神经语言模型作为基线，该模型包含2层LSTM后接Softmax输出层。同样，调整MoS的网络大小以确保参数数量相当。值得注意的是，没有使用dropout，因为我们发现它对两个模型都没有帮助（更多细节见附录B.2）。

items.en: To show that the MoS is a generic structure that can be used to model other context-dependent distributions, we additionally conduct experiments in the dialog domain. We use the Switchboard dataset (Godfrey & Holliman, 1997) preprocessed by Zhao et al. (2017)444https://github.com/snakeztc/NeuralDialog-CVAE/tree/master/data to train a Seq2Seq (Sutskever et al., 2014) model with MoS added to the decoder RNN. Then, a Seq2Seq model using Softmax and another one augmented by MoC with comparable parameter sizes are used as baselines. For evaluation, we include both the perplexity and the precision/recall of Smoothed Sentence-level BLEU, as suggested by Zhao et al. (2017). When generating responses, we use beam search with beam size 10, restrict the maximum length to 30, and retain the top-5 responses.
items.zh: 为了展示MoS是一种可用于建模其他上下文相关分布的通用结构，我们还在对话领域进行了实验。我们使用Zhao等人（2017）预处理的Switchboard数据集（Godfrey & Holliman, 1997）训练一个Seq2Seq（Sutskever等人，2014）模型，并在解码器RNN中添加MoS。然后，使用Softmax的Seq2Seq模型和另一个使用MoC增强且参数大小相当的模型作为基线。为了评估，我们包括困惑度以及平滑句子级BLEU的精确率/召回率，如Zhao等人（2017）所建议。生成响应时，我们使用束搜索，束大小为10，最大长度限制为30，并保留前5个响应。

items.en: The language modeling results on PTB and WT2 are presented in Table 1 and Table 2 respectively. With a comparable number of parameters, MoS outperforms all baselines with or without dynamic evaluation, and substantially improves over the current state of the art, by up to 3.6 points in perplexity.
items.zh: PTB和WT2上的语言建模结果分别见表1和表2。在参数数量相当的情况下，无论是否使用动态评估，MoS都优于所有基线，并在当前最先进水平上显著改进，困惑度最多降低3.6点。

items.en: The improvement on the large-scale dataset is even more significant. As shown in Table 3, MoS outperforms Softmax by over 5.6 points in perplexity. It suggests the effectiveness of MoS is not limited to small datasets where many regularization techniques are used. Note that with limited computational resources, we didn’t tune the hyper-parameters for MoS.
items.zh: 在大规模数据集上的改进甚至更为显著。如表3所示，MoS在困惑度上比Softmax低超过5.6点。这表明MoS的有效性不仅限于使用许多正则化技术的小数据集。注意，由于计算资源有限，我们没有为MoS调整超参数。

items.en: Further, the experimental results on Switchboard are summarized in Table 4555The numbers are not directly comparable to Zhao et al. (2017) since their Seq2Seq implementation and evaluation scripts are not publicly available.. Clearly, on all metrics, MoS outperforms MoC and Softmax, showing its general effectiveness.
items.zh: 此外，Switchboard上的实验结果总结在表4中。显然，在所有指标上，MoS都优于MoC和Softmax，显示了其普遍有效性。

items.en: To further verify the improvement shown above does come from the MoS structure rather than adding another hidden layer or finding a particular set of hyper-parameters, we conduct an ablation study on both PTB and WT2. Firstly, we compare MoS with an MoC architecture with the same number of layers, hidden sizes, and embedding sizes, which thus has the same number of parameters. In addition, we adopt the hyper-parameters used to obtain the best MoS model (denoted as MoS hyper-parameters), and train a baseline AWD-LSTM. To avoid distractive factors and save computational resources, all ablative experiments excluded the use of finetuing and dynamic evaluation.
items.zh: 为了进一步验证上述改进确实来自MoS结构，而不是添加另一个隐藏层或找到特定的超参数集，我们在PTB和WT2上进行了消融研究。首先，我们将MoS与具有相同层数、隐藏大小和嵌入大小的MoC架构进行比较，因此参数数量相同。此外，我们采用获得最佳MoS模型的超参数（记为MoS超参数），并训练一个基线AWD-LSTM。为了避免干扰因素并节省计算资源，所有消融实验排除了微调和动态评估的使用。

items.en: The results are shown in Table 5. Compared to the vanilla AWD-LSTM, though being more expressive, MoC performs only better on PTB, but worse on WT2. It suggests that simply adding another hidden layer or employing a mixture structure in the feature space does not guarantee a better performance. On the other hand, training AWD-LSTM using MoS hyper-parameters severely hurts the performance, which rules out hyper-parameters as the main source of improvement.
items.zh: 结果如表5所示。与原始AWD-LSTM相比，尽管MoC更具表达力，但在PTB上表现更好，在WT2上却更差。这表明仅仅添加另一个隐藏层或在特征空间中使用混合结构并不能保证更好的性能。另一方面，使用MoS超参数训练AWD-LSTM严重损害了性能，这排除了超参数作为改进主要来源的可能性。

items.en: While the study above verifies that MoS is the key to achieving the state-of-the-art performance, it is still not clear whether the superiority of MoS comes from its potential high rank, as suggested by our theoretical analysis in Section 2. In the sequel, we take steps to verify this hypothesis.
items.zh: 虽然上述研究验证了MoS是实现最先进性能的关键，但仍不清楚MoS的优越性是否来自其潜在的高秩，正如我们在第2节的理论分析所表明的。接下来，我们采取措施验证这一假设。

items.en: Firstly, we verify that MoS does induce a high-rank log-probability matrix empirically, while MoC and Softmax fail. On the validation or test set of PTB with tokens 𝐗={X1,…,XT}𝐗subscript𝑋1…subscript𝑋𝑇\mathbf{X}=\{X_{1},\dots,X_{T}\}, we compute the log probabilities {log⁡P​(Xi∣X<i)∈ℝM}t=1Tsuperscriptsubscript𝑃conditionalsubscript𝑋𝑖subscript𝑋absent𝑖superscriptℝ𝑀𝑡1𝑇\{\log P(X_{i}\mid X_{<i})\in\mathbb{R}^{M}\}_{t=1}^{T} for each token using all three models. Then, for each model, we stack all T𝑇T log-probability vectors into a T×M𝑇𝑀T\times M matrix, resulting in 𝐀^MoSsubscript^𝐀MoS\hat{\mathbf{A}}_{\text{MoS}}, 𝐀^MoCsubscript^𝐀MoC\hat{\mathbf{A}}_{\text{MoC}} and 𝐀^Softmaxsubscript^𝐀Softmax\hat{\mathbf{A}}_{\text{Softmax}}. Theoretically, the number of non-zero singular values of a matrix is equal to its rank. However, performing singular value decomposition of real valued matrices using numerical approaches often encounter roundoff errors. Hence, we adopt the expected roundoff error suggested by Press (2007) when estimating the ranks of 𝐀^MoSsubscript^𝐀MoS\hat{\mathbf{A}}_{\text{MoS}}, 𝐀^MoCsubscript^𝐀MoC\hat{\mathbf{A}}_{\text{MoC}} and 𝐀^Softmaxsubscript^𝐀Softmax\hat{\mathbf{A}}_{\text{Softmax}}.
items.zh: 首先，我们实证验证MoS确实诱导出高秩的对数概率矩阵，而MoC和Softmax则不能。在PTB的验证集或测试集上，对于词元X = {X_1, …, X_T}，我们使用所有三个模型计算每个词元的对数概率{log P(X_i | X_{<i}) ∈ ℝ^M}_{t=1}^T。然后，对于每个模型，我们将所有T个对数概率向量堆叠成一个T×M矩阵，得到Â_MoS、Â_MoC和Â_Softmax。理论上，矩阵的非零奇异值数量等于其秩。然而，使用数值方法对实值矩阵进行奇异值分解时常常会遇到舍入误差。因此，在估计Â_MoS、Â_MoC和Â_Softmax的秩时，我们采用Press（2007）建议的预期舍入误差。

items.en: The estimated ranks are shown in Table 7. As predicted by our theoretical analysis, the matrix ranks induced by Softmax and MoC are both limited by the corresponding embedding sizes. By contrast, the matrix rank obtained from MoS does not suffer from this constraint, almost reaching full rank (M=10000𝑀10000M=10000). In appendix C.1, we give additional evidences for the higher rank of MoS.
items.zh: 估计的秩如表7所示。正如我们的理论分析所预测的，Softmax和MoC诱导的矩阵秩都受相应嵌入大小的限制。相比之下，从MoS获得的矩阵秩不受此约束，几乎达到满秩（M=10000）。在附录C.1中，我们给出了MoS更高秩的额外证据。

items.en: Secondly, we show that, before reaching full rank, increasing the number of mixture components in MoS also increases the rank of the log-probability matrix, which in turn leads to improved performance (lower perplexity). Specifically, on PTB, with other hyper-parameters fixed as used in section 3.1, we vary the number of mixtures used in MoS and compare the corresponding empirical rank and test perplexity without finetuning. Table 7 summarizes the results. This clear positive correlation between rank and performance strongly supports the our theoretical analysis in section 2. Moreover, note that after reaching almost full rank (i.e., using 15 mixture components), further increasing the number of components degrades the performance due to overfitting (as we inspected the training and test perplexities).
items.zh: 其次，我们表明，在达到满秩之前，增加MoS中混合分量的数量也会增加对数概率矩阵的秩，从而带来性能提升（更低的困惑度）。具体来说，在PTB上，固定其他超参数（如第3.1节所用），我们改变MoS中使用的混合数量，并比较相应的经验秩和测试困惑度（无微调）。表7总结了结果。这种秩与性能之间的明显正相关强烈支持了我们在第2节的理论分析。此外，注意在达到几乎满秩后（即使用15个混合分量），进一步增加分量数量会因过拟合而降低性能（正如我们检查训练和测试困惑度所见）。

items.en: In addition, as performance improvement can often come from better regularization, we investigate whether MoS has a better, though unexpected, regularization effect compared to Softmax. We consider the 1B word dataset where overfitting is unlikely and no explicit regularization technique (e.g., dropout) is employed. As we can see from the left part of Table 3, MoS and Softmax achieve a similar generalization gap, i.e., the performance gap between the test set and the training set. It suggests both models have similar regularization effects. Meanwhile, MoS has a lower training perplexity compared to Softmax, indicating that the improvement of MoS results from improved expressiveness.
items.zh: 此外，由于性能改进通常可能来自更好的正则化，我们研究了MoS是否具有比Softmax更好但意外的正则化效果。我们考虑1B词数据集，其中过拟合不太可能发生，并且没有使用显式正则化技术（例如dropout）。从表3左侧可以看出，MoS和Softmax实现了相似的泛化差距，即测试集和训练集之间的性能差距。这表明两个模型具有相似的正则化效果。同时，MoS的训练困惑度低于Softmax，表明MoS的改进来自表达能力的提升。

items.en: The last evidence we provide is based on an inverse experiment. Empirically, we find that when Softmax does not suffer from a rank limitation, e.g., in character-level language modeling, using MoS will not improve the performance. Due to lack of space, we refer readers to Appendix C.2 for details.
items.zh: 我们提供的最后一个证据基于一个反向实验。实证上，我们发现当Softmax不受秩限制时，例如在字符级语言建模中，使用MoS不会提高性能。由于篇幅限制，我们请读者参阅附录C.2了解详情。

items.en: The expressiveness of MoS does come with a computational cost—computing a K𝐾K-times larger Softmax. To give readers a concrete idea of the influence on training time, we perform detailed analysis in Appendix C.3. As we will see, computational wall time of MoS is actually sub-linear w.r.t. the number of Softmaxes K𝐾K. In most settings, we observe a two to three times slowdown when using MoS with up to 15 mixture components.
items.zh: MoS的表达能力确实带来了计算成本——计算一个K倍大的Softmax。为了让读者具体了解对训练时间的影响，我们在附录C.3中进行了详细分析。我们将看到，MoS的计算墙时间实际上相对于Softmax的数量K是次线性的。在大多数设置中，我们观察到使用最多15个混合分量的MoS时，速度减慢两到三倍。

items.en: Finally, we conduct a case study on PTB to see how MoS improves the next-token prediction in detail. Due to lack of space, we refer readers to Appendix C.4 for details. The key insight from the case study is that MoS is better at making context-dependent predictions. Specifically, given the same immediate preceding word, MoS will produce distinct next-step prediction based on long-term context in history. By contrast, the baseline often yields similar next-step prediction, independent of the long-term context.
items.zh: 最后，我们在PTB上进行案例研究，以详细了解MoS如何改进下一个词预测。由于篇幅限制，我们请读者参阅附录C.4了解详情。案例研究的关键见解是，MoS更擅长进行上下文相关的预测。具体来说，给定相同的紧邻前一个词，MoS会根据历史中的长期上下文产生不同的下一步预测。相比之下，基线通常产生相似的下一步预测，与长期上下文无关。

items.en: In language modeling, Hutchinson et al. (2011; 2012) have previously considered the problem from a matrix rank perspective. However, their focus was to improve the generalization of Ngram language models via a sparse plus low-rank approximation. By contrast, as neural language models already generalize well, we focus on a high-rank neural language model that improves expressiveness without sacrificing generalization. Neubig & Dyer (2016) proposed to mix Ngram and neural language models to unify and benefit from both. However, this mixture might not generalize well since an Ngram model, which has poor generalization, is included. Moreover, the fact that the two components are separately trained can limit its expressiveness. Levy & Goldberg (2014) also considered the matrix factorization perspective, but in the context of learning word embeddings.
items.zh: 在语言建模中，Hutchinson 等人 (2011; 2012) 先前从矩阵秩的角度考虑了该问题。然而，他们的重点是通过稀疏加低秩近似来改进 Ngram 语言模型的泛化能力。相比之下，由于神经语言模型已经具有良好的泛化能力，我们专注于一种高秩神经语言模型，它在不牺牲泛化能力的情况下提高了表达能力。Neubig & Dyer (2016) 提出混合 Ngram 和神经语言模型，以统一并受益于两者。然而，这种混合可能无法很好地泛化，因为包含了泛化能力较差的 Ngram 模型。此外，两个组件分别训练的事实可能限制其表达能力。Levy & Goldberg (2014) 也考虑了矩阵分解的视角，但是在学习词嵌入的背景下。

items.en: In a general sense, Mixture of Softmaxes proposed in this work can be seen as a particular instantiation of the long-existing idea called Mixture of Experts (MoE) (Jacobs et al., 1991). However, there are two core differences. Firstly, MoE has usually been instantiated as mixture of Gaussians to model data in continuous domains (Jacobs et al., 1991; Graves, 2013; Bazzani et al., 2016). More importantly, the motivation of using the mixture structure is distinct. For Gaussian mixture models, the mixture structure is employed to allow for a parameterized multi-modal distribution. By contrast, Softmax by itself can parameterize a multi-modal distribution, and MoS is introduced to break the Softmax bottleneck as discussed in Section 2.
items.zh: 从广义上讲，本文提出的 Softmax 混合可以看作是长期存在的专家混合（MoE）思想的一个特定实例（Jacobs 等人，1991）。然而，有两个核心区别。首先，MoE 通常被实例化为高斯混合模型，用于对连续域中的数据进行建模（Jacobs 等人，1991；Graves，2013；Bazzani 等人，2016）。更重要的是，使用混合结构的动机是不同的。对于高斯混合模型，采用混合结构是为了允许参数化的多模态分布。相比之下，Softmax 本身可以参数化多模态分布，而引入 MoS 是为了打破第 2 节讨论的 Softmax 瓶颈。

items.en: There has been previous work (Eigen et al., 2013; Shazeer et al., 2017) proposing architectures that can be categorized as instantiations of MoC, since the mixture structure is employed in the feature space.666Although Shazeer et al. (2017) name their architecture as MoE, it is not a standard MoE (Jacobs et al., 1991) and should be classified as MoC under our terminology. The target of Eigen et al. (2013) is to create a more expressive feed-forward layer through the mixture structure. In comparison, Shazeer et al. (2017) focuses on a sparse gating mechanism also on the feature level, which enables efficient conditional computation and allows the training of a very large neural architecture. In addition to having different motivations from our work, all these MoC variants suffer from the same rank limitation problem as discussed in Section 2.
items.zh: 先前已有工作（Eigen 等人，2013；Shazeer 等人，2017）提出了可归类为 MoC 实例的架构，因为混合结构被用于特征空间。666尽管 Shazeer 等人 (2017) 将其架构命名为 MoE，但它不是标准的 MoE（Jacobs 等人，1991），根据我们的术语应归类为 MoC。Eigen 等人 (2013) 的目标是通过混合结构创建更具表达力的前馈层。相比之下，Shazeer 等人 (2017) 专注于特征层面的稀疏门控机制，这使得高效的条件计算成为可能，并允许训练非常大的神经架构。除了与我们的工作动机不同之外，所有这些 MoC 变体都受到第 2 节讨论的相同秩限制问题的影响。

items.en: Finally, several previous works have tried to introduce latent variables into sequence modeling (Bayer & Osendorfer, 2014; Gregor et al., 2015; Chung et al., 2015; Gan et al., 2015; Fraccaro et al., 2016; Chung et al., 2016). Except for (Chung et al., 2016), these structures all define a continuous latent variable for each step of the RNN computation, and rely on the SGVB estimator (Kingma & Welling, 2013) to optimize a variational lower bound of the log-likelihood. Since exact integration is infeasible, these models cannot estimate the likelihood (perplexity) exactly at test time. Moreover, for discrete data, the variational lower bound is usually too loose to yield a competitive approximation compared to standard auto-regressive models. As an exception, Chung et al. (2016) utilizes Bernoulli latent variables to model the hierarchical structure in language, where the Bernoulli sampling is replaced by a thresholding operation at test time to give perplexity estimation.
items.zh: 最后，一些先前的工作尝试将潜变量引入序列建模（Bayer & Osendorfer，2014；Gregor 等人，2015；Chung 等人，2015；Gan 等人，2015；Fraccaro 等人，2016；Chung 等人，2016）。除了 (Chung 等人，2016) 之外，这些结构都为 RNN 计算的每一步定义了一个连续潜变量，并依赖 SGVB 估计器（Kingma & Welling，2013）来优化对数似然的变分下界。由于精确积分不可行，这些模型无法在测试时精确估计似然（困惑度）。此外，对于离散数据，变分下界通常过于宽松，无法与标准自回归模型相比产生有竞争力的近似。作为一个例外，Chung 等人 (2016) 利用伯努利潜变量对语言中的层次结构进行建模，其中在测试时用阈值操作替换伯努利采样以给出困惑度估计。

items.en: Under the matrix factorization framework, the expressiveness of Softmax-based language models is limited by the dimension of the word embeddings, which is termed as the Softmax bottleneck. Our proposed MoS model improves the expressiveness over Softmax, and at the same time avoids overfitting compared to non-parametric models and naively increasing the word embedding dimensions. Our method improves the current state-of-the-art results on standard benchmarks by a large margin, which in turn justifies our theoretical reasoning: it is important to have a high-rank model for natural language.
items.zh: 在矩阵分解框架下，基于 Softmax 的语言模型的表达能力受到词嵌入维度的限制，这被称为 Softmax 瓶颈。我们提出的 MoS 模型提高了相对于 Softmax 的表达能力，同时避免了非参数模型和单纯增加词嵌入维度带来的过拟合。我们的方法在标准基准上大幅提升了当前最先进的结果，这反过来证明了我们的理论推理：对于自然语言，拥有高秩模型很重要。
